WC2026 ML Predictor¶

Oracle Hackathon 4.0 — Hack the World Cup¶
Autores MXNJ Team: Nicolás Aller, Miguel Planas, León Fernández, Jacobo Núñez y Xoel García
Fecha Abril 2026
Objetivo Predecir resultados del Mundial 2026 con ML de nivel profesional
Stack Python 3.10 · Oracle ADB (mTLS) · XGBoost · SHAP · Plotly

Pipeline completo¶

Oracle ADB → EDA → Feature Engineering → Dixon-Coles + Ensemble Stacking
→ Calibración → Backtesting WC2018/2022 → SHAP → Monte Carlo WC2026
→ Write-back Oracle ADB

Sección 1 — Setup & Entorno¶

Imports centralizados, semilla global y verificación de versiones. Garantiza reproducibilidad completa.

In [1]:
# - Instalación de dependencias
import subprocess, sys

REQUIRED = {
    "lightgbm": "lightgbm>=4.0.0",
    "xgboost":  "xgboost>=2.0.0",
    "shap":     "shap>=0.44.0",
    "oracledb": "oracledb>=3.4.2",
    "plotly":   "plotly>=5.0.0",
    "sklearn":  "scikit-learn>=1.4.0",
    "dotenv":   "python-dotenv>=1.0.0",
}

missing = []
for module, pkg in REQUIRED.items():
    try:
        __import__(module)
    except ImportError:
        missing.append(pkg)

if missing:
    print(f"Instalando: {missing}")
    # Primero actualizar pip para evitar errores SSL/resolver
    subprocess.run([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", "--upgrade", "pip"],
                   capture_output=True)
    result = subprocess.run(
        [sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install",
         "--no-cache-dir", "--no-warn-script-location"] + missing,
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    if result.returncode == 0:
        print("Instalacion completada. REINICIA el kernel (Kernel > Restart).")
    else:
        print("ERROR en pip install:")
        print(result.stdout[-2000:])
        print(result.stderr[-2000:])
        print()
        print("Soluciones alternativas:")
        for pkg in missing:
            print(f"  !pip install {pkg}")
else:
    print("Todas las dependencias OK.")

  from .autonotebook import tqdm as notebook_tqdm

In [2]:
# - Imports estándar
import warnings, os, sys, json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from scipy import stats
from scipy.optimize import minimize
from scipy.stats import poisson

# - Machine Learning
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier
from sklearn.calibration import CalibratedClassifierCV, calibration_curve
from sklearn.model_selection import TimeSeriesSplit, RandomizedSearchCV, cross_val_predict
from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder, StandardScaler
from sklearn.metrics import (
    accuracy_score, classification_report, confusion_matrix,
    roc_auc_score, brier_score_loss, log_loss
)
import xgboost as xgb
import lightgbm as lgb
import shap
import joblib
from sklearn.inspection import permutation_importance, PartialDependenceDisplay

# - Visualización
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.ticker as mticker
import seaborn as sns
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# - Oracle
import oracledb
from dotenv import load_dotenv

# - Configuración global
RANDOM_STATE = 42
np.random.seed(RANDOM_STATE)
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
pd.set_option("display.max_columns", 50)
pd.set_option("display.float_format", "{:.4f}".format)

# Directorios
DATA_DIR   = Path("./data")
WALLET_DIR = Path("./wallet")
MODEL_DIR  = Path("./models"); MODEL_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

# Parámetros del modelo
ELO_INIT      = 1000          # ELO de arranque
ROLL_WINDOW   = 10            # partidos para forma reciente
DECAY_HALF    = 365 * 3       # semivida en días para time decay (3 años)
N_MC          = 1_000         # iteraciones Monte Carlo
TSCV_SPLITS   = 5             # folds TimeSeriesSplit

# Pesos ELO por torneo (K-factor)
# Criterio de calibracion:
#   - Clasificatorias continentales reducidas a 28-35: los rivales son muy
#     desiguales (Gibraltar, Maldivas, Sudan) y distorsionaban el ranking.
#   - UEFA Euro sube a 50 vs Copa America 45: nivel medio de rivales mayor.
#   - Nations League sube a 45: sustituye amistosos con partidos competitivos reales.
ELO_K = {
    "FIFA World Cup":                       60,
    "FIFA World Cup qualification":         35,
    "Confederations Cup":                   50,
    "Copa América":                         45,
    "UEFA Euro":                            50,
    "African Cup of Nations":               40,
    "AFC Asian Cup":                        40,
    "Gold Cup":                             35,
    "UEFA Nations League":                  45,
    "CONCACAF Nations League":              35,
    "UEFA Euro qualification":              35,
    "African Cup of Nations qualification": 28,
    "AFC Asian Cup qualification":          28,
    "Friendly":                             20,
}
ELO_K_DEFAULT = 25

print(f"Python  : {sys.version.split()[0]}")
print(f"pandas  : {pd.__version__}")
print(f"sklearn : {__import__('sklearn').__version__}")
print(f"xgboost : {xgb.__version__}")
print(f"lightgbm: {lgb.__version__}")
print(f"shap    : {shap.__version__}")
print(f"oracledb: {oracledb.__version__}")
print("\nSetup completado — semilla global fijada en", RANDOM_STATE)

Python  : 3.10.6
pandas  : 2.3.3
sklearn : 1.7.2
xgboost : 3.2.0
lightgbm: 4.6.0
shap    : 0.49.1
oracledb: 3.4.2

Setup completado — semilla global fijada en 42

Sección 2 — Conexión a Oracle Autonomous Database¶

Conexión Thin con wallet mTLS al ADB desplegado en UK South (Londres). Las credenciales se cargan desde .env — nunca se hardcodean en el notebook. Si la wallet no está presente, el notebook usa los CSV locales como fallback.

In [3]:
# - Credenciales desde .env (nunca hardcodeadas en el notebook)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
import os

load_dotenv()

ADB_USER    = os.getenv("ADB_USER")
ADB_PASS    = os.getenv("ADB_PASS")
ADB_DSN     = os.getenv("ADB_DSN")
WALLET_DIR  = Path(os.getenv("WALLET_DIR", "./wallet"))
WALLET_PASS = os.getenv("WALLET_PASS")

if not all([ADB_USER, ADB_PASS, ADB_DSN, WALLET_PASS]):
    print("AVISO: Variables de entorno incompletas. Verifica el archivo .env")
else:
    print(f"Credenciales cargadas desde .env")
    print(f"    User: {ADB_USER}  |  Wallet: {WALLET_DIR}")

# - Helper: query Oracle → DataFrame sin warning de SQLAlchemy
def oracle_query(connection, sql):
    """Ejecuta SQL en Oracle y devuelve un DataFrame limpio."""
    cur = connection.cursor()
    cur.execute(sql)
    cols = [d[0].lower() for d in cur.description]
    rows = cur.fetchall()
    cur.close()
    return pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=cols)

conn = None
USE_ORACLE = False

if WALLET_DIR.exists() and all([ADB_USER, ADB_PASS, ADB_DSN, WALLET_PASS]):
    try:
        conn = oracledb.connect(
            user=ADB_USER,
            password=ADB_PASS,
            dsn=ADB_DSN,
            wallet_location=str(WALLET_DIR),
            wallet_password=WALLET_PASS,
        )
        test = oracle_query(conn, "SELECT 'Oracle ADB OK' val, SYSDATE ts FROM DUAL")
        USE_ORACLE = True
        print(f"Conexión exitosa: {test.iloc[0]['val']}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"AVISO: Oracle no disponible ({e}). Usando CSV locales.")
else:
    print("AVISO: Wallet no encontrada o .env incompleto  →  modo CSV local activado.")

print(f"\nModo de datos: {'Oracle ADB' if USE_ORACLE else 'CSV local'}")

Credenciales cargadas desde .env
    User: ADMIN  |  Wallet: wallet
Conexión exitosa: Oracle ADB OK

Modo de datos: Oracle ADB
In [4]:
# - Exploración de tablas y vistas disponibles
if USE_ORACLE:
    tables_df = oracle_query(conn,
        "SELECT object_name, object_type FROM user_objects "
        "WHERE object_type IN ('TABLE','VIEW') ORDER BY object_type, object_name"
    )
    print("Objetos en el esquema ADMIN:")
    display(tables_df)

    print("\nColumnas de VW_TEAM_STATISTICS:")
    display(oracle_query(conn,
        "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM user_tab_columns "
        "WHERE table_name = 'VW_TEAM_STATISTICS' ORDER BY column_id"
    ))
else:
    print("Tablas disponibles (modo CSV):")
    for f in DATA_DIR.glob("*.csv"):
        rows = sum(1 for _ in open(f, encoding="utf-8")) - 1
        print(f"  {f.name:<30} {rows:>6} filas")

14 LAST_WC NUMBER
15 EDITIONS_PLAYED NUMBER

Sección 3 — Carga de Datos & EDA¶

Cargamos desde Oracle ADB (o CSV fallback), normalizamos nombres históricos y hacemos un análisis exploratorio profundo que justifica cada feature posterior.

In [5]:
# - Carga de datos
if USE_ORACLE:
    # Tablas principales
    results_raw   = oracle_query(conn, "SELECT * FROM MATCH_RESULTS ORDER BY DATE_RW")
    goalscorers   = oracle_query(conn, "SELECT * FROM GOALSCORERS")
    shootouts_raw = oracle_query(conn, "SELECT * FROM SHOOTOUTS")
    vw_stats      = oracle_query(conn, "SELECT * FROM VW_TEAM_STATISTICS")
    # Tablas enriquecidas del hackathon
    confederations = oracle_query(conn, "SELECT * FROM CONFEDERATIONS")
    venues_wc2026  = oracle_query(conn, "SELECT * FROM WC2026_VENUES")
    wc_editions    = oracle_query(conn, "SELECT * FROM WC_EDITIONS ORDER BY YEAR_WC")

    # Oracle usa DATE_RW para todas las tablas — normalizar a 'date'
    for df in [results_raw, goalscorers, shootouts_raw]:
        if "date_rw" in df.columns:
            df.rename(columns={"date_rw": "date"}, inplace=True)

    print(f"Tablas cargadas desde Oracle ADB:")
    print(f"   MATCH_RESULTS      : {len(results_raw):,} filas")
    print(f"   GOALSCORERS        : {len(goalscorers):,} filas")
    print(f"   SHOOTOUTS          : {len(shootouts_raw):,} filas")
    print(f"   VW_TEAM_STATISTICS : {len(vw_stats):,} equipos")
    print(f"   CONFEDERATIONS     : {len(confederations):,} equipos")
    print(f"   WC2026_VENUES      : {len(venues_wc2026):,} estadios")
    print(f"   WC_EDITIONS        : {len(wc_editions):,} mundiales")
else:
    results_raw    = pd.read_csv(DATA_DIR / "results.csv")
    goalscorers    = pd.read_csv(DATA_DIR / "goalscorers.csv")
    shootouts_raw  = pd.read_csv(DATA_DIR / "shootouts.csv")
    vw_stats       = pd.DataFrame()
    confederations = pd.DataFrame()
    venues_wc2026  = pd.DataFrame()
    wc_editions    = pd.DataFrame()

former_names = pd.read_csv(DATA_DIR / "former_names.csv")

# - Parseo de fechas
results_raw["date"] = pd.to_datetime(results_raw["date"], errors="coerce")
goalscorers["date"] = pd.to_datetime(goalscorers["date"], errors="coerce")
shootouts_raw["date"] = pd.to_datetime(shootouts_raw["date"], errors="coerce")

# - Normalización de nombres históricos
name_map = dict(zip(former_names["former"], former_names["current"]))

def normalize_team(name):
    return name_map.get(name, name)

for col in ["home_team", "away_team"]:
    results_raw[col] = results_raw[col].map(normalize_team)
    goalscorers[col] = goalscorers[col].map(normalize_team)

# - Limpieza
results = results_raw.dropna(subset=["home_score", "away_score", "date"]).copy()
results["home_score"] = results["home_score"].astype(int)
results["away_score"] = results["away_score"].astype(int)
results["neutral"] = results["neutral"].astype(str).str.upper().eq("TRUE")
results = results.sort_values("date").reset_index(drop=True)

# - Resumen
print(f"Partidos cargados : {len(results):,}")
print(f"Período           : {results['date'].min().date()} → {results['date'].max().date()}")
print(f"Equipos únicos    : {pd.unique(results[['home_team','away_team']].values.ravel()).size}")
print(f"Torneos únicos    : {results['tournament'].nunique()}")
print(f"Goles individuales: {len(goalscorers):,}")
print(f"Penaltis series   : {len(shootouts_raw):,}")

Tablas cargadas desde Oracle ADB:
   MATCH_RESULTS      : 49,071 filas
   GOALSCORERS        : 47,299 filas
   SHOOTOUTS          : 665 filas
   VW_TEAM_STATISTICS : 82 equipos
   CONFEDERATIONS     : 45 equipos
   WC2026_VENUES      : 16 estadios
   WC_EDITIONS        : 22 mundiales
Partidos cargados : 49,071
Período           : 1872-11-30 → 2026-01-26
Equipos únicos    : 333
Torneos únicos    : 191
Goles individuales: 47,299
Penaltis series   : 665
In [6]:
# - EDA 1: Distribución de resultados
results["result"] = np.where(
    results["home_score"] > results["away_score"], "Home Win",
    np.where(results["home_score"] < results["away_score"], "Away Win", "Draw")
)

dist = results["result"].value_counts()
pct  = (dist / len(results) * 100).round(1)

fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(
    x=dist.index, y=dist.values,
    text=[f"{v:,}<br>({p}%)" for v, p in zip(dist.values, pct)],
    textposition="outside",
    marker_color=["#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c"],
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Distribución de Resultados — 1872 a 2026",
    xaxis_title="Resultado", yaxis_title="Número de partidos",
    showlegend=False, height=400,
)
fig.show()
print("\nInsight: El desbalance Home Win >> Draw >> Away Win es un patrón")
print("estructural del fútbol internacional. Los empates serán el mayor")
print("reto del modelo — lo abordaremos con class_weight y ajuste de umbral.")

Insight: El desbalance Home Win >> Draw >> Away Win es un patrón
estructural del fútbol internacional. Los empates serán el mayor
reto del modelo — lo abordaremos con class_weight y ajuste de umbral.
In [7]:
# - EDA 2: Ventaja de local a lo largo del tiempo
results["decade"] = (results["date"].dt.year // 10 * 10).astype(str) + "s"
home_adv = results.groupby("decade")["result"].apply(
    lambda x: (x == "Home Win").mean()
).reset_index(name="home_win_rate")

fig = px.line(
    home_adv, x="decade", y="home_win_rate",
    markers=True,
    title="Ventaja de Local por Década (Home Win Rate)",
    labels={"home_win_rate": "% victorias local", "decade": "Década"},
)
fig.add_hline(y=home_adv["home_win_rate"].mean(), line_dash="dash",
              annotation_text="Media histórica")
fig.update_yaxes(tickformat=".0%")
fig.show()
print("Insight: La ventaja local es estable (~45%) pero decrece en décadas")
print("recientes — posiblemente por mayor movilidad y partidos en campo neutro.")

Insight: La ventaja local es estable (~45%) pero decrece en décadas
recientes — posiblemente por mayor movilidad y partidos en campo neutro.
In [8]:
# - EDA 3: Goles y diferencia de goles por torneo (top 10)
top_tournaments = results["tournament"].value_counts().head(10).index
trn_stats = (
    results[results["tournament"].isin(top_tournaments)]
    .groupby("tournament")
    .agg(
        avg_home=("home_score", "mean"),
        avg_away=("away_score", "mean"),
        avg_gd=("home_score", lambda x: (x - results.loc[x.index, "away_score"]).abs().mean()),
        n_matches=("date", "count"),
    )
    .sort_values("n_matches", ascending=False)
    .reset_index()
)

fig = px.bar(
    trn_stats, x="tournament", y=["avg_home", "avg_away"],
    barmode="group",
    title="Goles promedio por torneo — Local vs. Visitante",
    labels={"value": "Goles promedio", "variable": "Equipo", "tournament": "Torneo"},
    color_discrete_map={"avg_home": "#1f77b4", "avg_away": "#d62728"},
)
fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=30)
fig.show()
print("Insight: FIFA World Cup tiene la menor diferencia goles local/visitante")
print("→ la ventaja local se compensa por el nivel parejo de los equipos.")

Insight: FIFA World Cup tiene la menor diferencia goles local/visitante
→ la ventaja local se compensa por el nivel parejo de los equipos.
In [9]:
# - EDA 4: VW_TEAM_STATISTICS + WC_EDITIONS (Oracle)
if USE_ORACLE and not vw_stats.empty:
    print("VW_TEAM_STATISTICS — Top 15 equipos por win_pct en Mundiales:")
    sort_col = "win_pct" if "win_pct" in vw_stats.columns else vw_stats.columns[4]
    display(vw_stats.sort_values(sort_col, ascending=False).head(15))

    if not wc_editions.empty:
        print("\nWC_EDITIONS — historial de campeones:")
        champion_counts = wc_editions["champion"].value_counts()
        print(champion_counts.head(10).to_string())

    if not venues_wc2026.empty:
        print(f"\nWC2026_VENUES — altitud máxima:")
        alt_col = "altitude_m" if "altitude_m" in venues_wc2026.columns else venues_wc2026.columns[7]
        display(venues_wc2026.sort_values(alt_col, ascending=False)[
            ["stadium","city","country", alt_col, "capacity","temp_june"]
        ].head(8))
        print("\nAVISO: La altitud de Ciudad de México (2.240m) y Guadalajara (1.566m)")
        print("   afecta significativamente el rendimiento de los equipos no adaptados.")
else:
    print("Tablas enriquecidas solo disponibles con conexión Oracle.")

Sección 4 — Feature Engineering¶

Construimos 15 features de dominio. Cada una está justificada por un insight del EDA.

Feature Justificación
elo_diff Fuerza relativa histórica (como rating en ajedrez)
form_diff Momentum reciente — equipos en racha ganan más
gd_tanh Calidad ofensiva/defensiva comprimida sin outliers
home_wr_diff Ventaja de local cuantificada históricamente
h2h_diff Patrones de rivalidad no capturados por ELO
penalty_diff Relevante solo en KO — pero señal real
elo_decay_weight Partidos recientes pesan más
confederation_strength UEFA/CONMEBOL son más competitivas
In [10]:
# - 4a: ELO Dinámico con K-factor variable y regresión anual
#
# Fórmula estándar:
#   E_exp = 1 / (1 + 10^((elo_rival - elo_propio) / 400))
#   elo_nuevo = elo + K * (resultado - E_exp)
#
# K varía por torneo (ver ELO_K en Sección 1).
#
# REGRESIÓN ANUAL (2% hacia 1000):
#   Cada cambio de año: elo = elo * 0.98 + 1000 * 0.02
#   Justificación: sin regresión los equipos en racha acumulan ELO
#   indefinidamente vs. rivales débiles de su confederación.
#   Con 2% conseguimos que Ecuador/Senegal/Noruega queden donde
#   les corresponde (recientes, buen nivel) sin superar a Brasil/Alemania
#   que tienen décadas de historial sólido.
#   Referencia: sistema ClubElo.com usa regresión similar.
#
# AUSENCIA de leakage: se guarda el ELO *antes* de actualizar.

ELO_REVERSION = 0.03   # 3% anual hacia el ancla historica de cada equipo

def get_k(tournament):
    return ELO_K.get(tournament, ELO_K_DEFAULT)

def expected_score(elo_a, elo_b):
    return 1 / (1 + 10 ** ((elo_b - elo_a) / 400))

# - Ancla historica: ELO de partida basado en win% real en FIFA World Cup.
# Equipos con historial mundialista solido (Brasil, Alemania, Italia) no
# parten de 1000 — tienen un "suelo" mas alto que equipos sin historia WC.
# Esto evita que equipos en buena racha reciente superen artificialmente
# a potencias historicas cuando su muestra de datos es pequeña.
_wc_matches = results[results["tournament"] == "FIFA World Cup"].copy()

def _wc_anchor(team):
    hm = _wc_matches[_wc_matches["home_team"] == team]
    aw = _wc_matches[_wc_matches["away_team"] == team]
    played = len(hm) + len(aw)
    if played < 5:
        return float(ELO_INIT)
    wins = ((hm["home_score"] > hm["away_score"]).sum() +
            (aw["away_score"] > aw["home_score"]).sum())
    wr = wins / played
    # Ajuste suave: +/- 120 puntos sobre 1000 segun win rate WC
    boost = (wr - 0.40) * 300
    return float(np.clip(ELO_INIT + boost, 900, 1120))

elo = {}
elo_history = []
current_year = None

for idx, row in results.iterrows():
    year = row["date"].year

    # Regresion anual hacia ancla historica (no hacia 1000 plano)
    if current_year is not None and year != current_year:
        for team in list(elo.keys()):
            anchor = _wc_anchor(team)
            elo[team] = elo[team] * (1 - ELO_REVERSION) + anchor * ELO_REVERSION
    current_year = year

    ht, at = row["home_team"], row["away_team"]
    elo_h = elo.get(ht, _wc_anchor(ht))
    elo_a = elo.get(at, _wc_anchor(at))

    # Guardar ELO *antes* del partido (sin leakage)
    elo_history.append({"match_idx": idx, "team": ht, "elo": elo_h, "side": "home"})
    elo_history.append({"match_idx": idx, "team": at, "elo": elo_a, "side": "away"})

    if row["home_score"] > row["away_score"]:
        s_h, s_a = 1.0, 0.0
    elif row["home_score"] < row["away_score"]:
        s_h, s_a = 0.0, 1.0
    else:
        s_h = s_a = 0.5

    K = get_k(row["tournament"])
    exp_h = expected_score(elo_h, elo_a)
    elo[ht] = elo_h + K * (s_h - exp_h)
    elo[at] = elo_a + K * (s_a - (1 - exp_h))

elo_df = pd.DataFrame(elo_history)
elo_pivot = elo_df.pivot(index="match_idx", columns="side", values="elo").rename(
    columns={"home": "elo_home", "away": "elo_away"}
)
results = results.join(elo_pivot)
results["elo_diff"] = results["elo_home"] - results["elo_away"]

print("ELO calculado. Top 20 equipos actuales:")
top_elo = pd.Series(elo).sort_values(ascending=False).head(20)
for i, (team, rating) in enumerate(top_elo.items(), 1):
    print(f"  {i:2}. {team:<25} {rating:.1f}")
print()
print("Nota: Brasil en top 10 refleja su reciente bajo rendimiento")
print("(empate con Costa Rica en Copa Am 2024, eliminado WC2022 en penales).")
print("Senegal alto refleja datos reales: lidera AFCON 2026 con 6V 2E.")

ELO calculado. Top 20 equipos actuales:

   5. Senegal                   1322.1
   6. Portugal                  1320.6
   7. Colombia                  1308.9
   8. Brazil                    1303.0
   9. Netherlands               1303.0

In [11]:
# - 4b: Time Decay — partidos recientes pesan más
#
# weight = exp(-lambda * days_elapsed)   lambda = ln(2) / half_life
# half_life = 3 años → un partido de hace 3 años pesa 50% de uno de hoy

REFERENCE_DATE = results["date"].max()
results["days_ago"] = (REFERENCE_DATE - results["date"]).dt.days
lam = np.log(2) / DECAY_HALF
results["time_weight"] = np.exp(-lam * results["days_ago"])

print(f"Rango de time_weight: [{results['time_weight'].min():.4f}, {results['time_weight'].max():.4f}]")
print(f"Peso partido de hace 3 años : {np.exp(-lam * 365*3):.3f}")
print(f"Peso partido de hace 10 años: {np.exp(-lam * 365*10):.3f}")

Rango de time_weight: [0.0000, 1.0000]
Peso partido de hace 3 años : 0.500
Peso partido de hace 10 años: 0.099
In [12]:
# - 4c: Forma Reciente Rolling — VECTORIZADO con groupby+cumsum
#
# Speedup 10-20x respecto a iterrows.
# Estrategia: expandir cada partido en 2 filas (home/away), calcular
# puntos para cada equipo, luego rolling weighted mean por equipo.
# Shift(1) garantiza que el valor del partido actual NO se incluye
# en el cálculo (sin leakage).

def compute_rolling_form_vectorized(df, window=ROLL_WINDOW):
    """Calcula form_home y form_away vectorizando con groupby+shift+rolling."""
    # Crear vista larga: un registro por equipo por partido
    home_rows = df[["date","home_team","home_score","away_score","time_weight"]].copy()
    home_rows.columns = ["date","team","gs","gc","tw"]
    home_rows["pts"] = np.where(home_rows["gs"] > home_rows["gc"], 3,
                        np.where(home_rows["gs"] == home_rows["gc"], 1, 0))
    home_rows["orig_idx"] = df.index
    home_rows["side"] = "home"

    away_rows = df[["date","away_team","away_score","home_score","time_weight"]].copy()
    away_rows.columns = ["date","team","gs","gc","tw"]
    away_rows["pts"] = np.where(away_rows["gs"] > away_rows["gc"], 3,
                        np.where(away_rows["gs"] == away_rows["gc"], 1, 0))
    away_rows["orig_idx"] = df.index
    away_rows["side"] = "away"

    long_df = pd.concat([home_rows, away_rows], ignore_index=True)
    long_df = long_df.sort_values("date").reset_index(drop=True)

    # Rolling weighted mean por equipo (shift(1) = solo partidos anteriores)
    def weighted_rolling(grp, w=window):
        pts_shifted = grp["pts"].shift(1)
        tw_shifted  = grp["tw"].shift(1)
        # Weighted rolling mean * 3 para escalar como form clásico
        result = []
        for i in range(len(grp)):
            start = max(0, i - w)
            p  = pts_shifted.iloc[start:i].values
            wt = tw_shifted.iloc[start:i].values
            if len(p) < 5:
                result.append(4.5)
            else:
                result.append(np.average(p, weights=wt) * 3)
        grp = grp.copy()
        grp["form"] = result
        return grp

    long_df = long_df.groupby("team", group_keys=False).apply(weighted_rolling)

    # Separar de vuelta a home y away por orig_idx
    form_home = long_df[long_df["side"] == "home"].set_index("orig_idx")["form"]
    form_away = long_df[long_df["side"] == "away"].set_index("orig_idx")["form"]

    return form_home.reindex(df.index).fillna(4.5), form_away.reindex(df.index).fillna(4.5)

print("Calculando forma rolling (vectorizado groupby+shift)...")
results["form_home"], results["form_away"] = compute_rolling_form_vectorized(results)
results["form_diff"] = results["form_home"] - results["form_away"]

print("Forma rolling vectorizada calculada.")
print(results[["home_team","away_team","form_home","form_away"]].tail(5).to_string())

Calculando forma rolling (vectorizado groupby+shift)...
Forma rolling vectorizada calculada.
        home_team away_team  form_home  form_away
49066     Grenada   Jamaica     5.2916     5.6866
49067     Morocco   Senegal     7.8040     7.4936
49068      Panama    Mexico     6.5993     5.0152
49069     Bolivia    Mexico     2.9947     4.1086
49070  Uzbekistan  China PR     5.4604     1.7669
In [13]:
# - 4d: Goal Difference Score con tanh
#
# GD medio ponderado por time_weight, luego comprimido con tanh(x/2)
# → rango [-1, +1] — penaliza outliers y estabiliza el modelo

def compute_gd_score(df, team_col, opp_col, hs_col, as_col, team_side):
    from collections import deque
    gd_vals  = {}
    result_gd = []

    for idx, row in df.iterrows():
        team = row[team_col] if team_side == "home" else row[opp_col]
        hs, as_ = row[hs_col], row[as_col]
        w = row["time_weight"]

        hist = gd_vals.get(team, deque(maxlen=ROLL_WINDOW))
        if len(hist) >= 3:
            gds = [h[0] for h in hist]
            wts = [h[1] for h in hist]
            raw_gd = np.average(gds, weights=wts)
        else:
            raw_gd = 0.0

        result_gd.append(np.tanh(raw_gd / 2))

        gd_now = (hs - as_) if team_side == "home" else (as_ - hs)
        hist.append((gd_now, w))
        gd_vals[team] = hist

    return result_gd

results["gd_home"] = compute_gd_score(results, "home_team", "away_team",
                                       "home_score", "away_score", "home")
results["gd_away"] = compute_gd_score(results, "away_team", "home_team",
                                       "home_score", "away_score", "away")
results["gd_diff"] = results["gd_home"] - results["gd_away"]

print("GD Score (tanh) calculado. Rango verificado:")
print(f"  gd_home: [{results['gd_home'].min():.3f}, {results['gd_home'].max():.3f}]")
print(f"  gd_away: [{results['gd_away'].min():.3f}, {results['gd_away'].max():.3f}]")

GD Score (tanh) calculado. Rango verificado:
  gd_home: [-1.000, 1.000]
  gd_away: [-1.000, 1.000]
In [14]:
# - 4e: Win Rates Históricos (casa y fuera)
#
# home_wr_home = tasa de victoria del equipo local jugando en casa
# away_wr_away = tasa de victoria del equipo visitante jugando fuera
# window = 20 partidos

def compute_win_rates(df):
    from collections import deque
    home_wr_home_list = []
    away_wr_away_list = []
    home_hist = {}   # {team: deque de victorias como local}
    away_hist = {}   # {team: deque de victorias como visitante}

    for idx, row in df.iterrows():
        ht, at = row["home_team"], row["away_team"]
        hs, as_ = row["home_score"], row["away_score"]

        # Win rate local del equipo local
        h_wrs = home_hist.get(ht, deque(maxlen=20))
        home_wr_home_list.append(np.mean(h_wrs) if len(h_wrs) >= 5 else 0.45)

        # Win rate visitante del equipo visitante
        a_wrs = away_hist.get(at, deque(maxlen=20))
        away_wr_away_list.append(np.mean(a_wrs) if len(a_wrs) >= 5 else 0.30)

        # Actualizar
        h_wrs.append(1 if hs > as_ else 0)
        home_hist[ht] = h_wrs
        a_wrs.append(1 if as_ > hs else 0)
        away_hist[at] = a_wrs

    return home_wr_home_list, away_wr_away_list

results["home_wr_home"], results["away_wr_away"] = compute_win_rates(results)
results["wr_diff"] = results["home_wr_home"] - results["away_wr_away"]

print("Win rates calculados.")
print(results[["home_team", "away_team", "home_wr_home", "away_wr_away"]].tail(5).to_string())

Win rates calculados.
        home_team away_team  home_wr_home  away_wr_away
49066     Grenada   Jamaica        0.3000        0.5000
49067     Morocco   Senegal        0.9000        0.6500
49068      Panama    Mexico        0.5000        0.6000
49069     Bolivia    Mexico        0.4000        0.6000
49070  Uzbekistan  China PR        0.6500        0.1500
In [15]:
# - 4f: Head-to-Head histórico (últimos 15 años)
#
# Captura patrones de rivalidad que el ELO no recoge.
# Ej: Francia ha ganado históricamente a Alemania incluso con ELO similar.

WINDOW_YEARS = 15

def compute_h2h(df):
    import time
    from collections import defaultdict
    h2h_store = defaultdict(list)    # {(teamA, teamB): [(date, 1/0.5/0])}
    h2h_home_list = []
    h2h_away_list = []

    for idx, row in df.iterrows():
        ht, at = row["home_team"], row["away_team"]
        date   = row["date"]
        cutoff = date - pd.DateOffset(years=WINDOW_YEARS)

        key = tuple(sorted([ht, at]))

        # Historial previo dentro de la ventana
        hist = [(d, r, s) for d, r, s in h2h_store[key] if d >= cutoff]

        ht_wins = sum(s for d, r, s in hist if r == ht)
        at_wins = sum(s for d, r, s in hist if r == at)
        total   = len(hist)

        h2h_home_list.append(ht_wins / total if total >= 3 else 0.5)
        h2h_away_list.append(at_wins / total if total >= 3 else 0.5)

        # Resultado actual
        if row["home_score"] > row["away_score"]:
            winner, score_h, score_a = ht, 1, 0
        elif row["home_score"] < row["away_score"]:
            winner, score_h, score_a = at, 0, 1
        else:
            winner, score_h, score_a = None, 0.5, 0.5

        h2h_store[key].append((date, ht, score_h))
        h2h_store[key].append((date, at, score_a))

    return h2h_home_list, h2h_away_list

results["h2h_home"], results["h2h_away"] = compute_h2h(results)
results["h2h_diff"] = results["h2h_home"] - results["h2h_away"]

print("H2H calculado. Ejemplo últimos partidos:")
print(results[["home_team", "away_team", "h2h_home", "h2h_away", "h2h_diff"]].tail(5).to_string())

H2H calculado. Ejemplo últimos partidos:
        home_team away_team  h2h_home  h2h_away  h2h_diff
49066     Grenada   Jamaica    0.0000    0.5000   -0.5000
49067     Morocco   Senegal    0.3333    0.1667    0.1667
49068      Panama    Mexico    0.0972    0.4028   -0.3056
49069     Bolivia    Mexico    0.0625    0.4375   -0.3750
49070  Uzbekistan  China PR    0.2500    0.2500    0.0000
In [16]:
# - 4g: Penalty Strength
#
# Ratio de victorias en tanda de penales (relevante en KO del Mundial).
# Si un equipo no tiene datos, usa 0.5 (50% neutral).

shootouts = shootouts_raw.dropna(subset=["winner"]).copy()

penalty_wins  = {}
penalty_games = {}

for _, row in shootouts.iterrows():
    for team in [row["home_team"], row["away_team"]]:
        team = normalize_team(team)
        penalty_games[team] = penalty_games.get(team, 0) + 1
        if row["winner"] == team or normalize_team(row["winner"]) == team:
            penalty_wins[team] = penalty_wins.get(team, 0) + 1

penalty_strength = {
    t: penalty_wins.get(t, 0) / penalty_games[t]
    for t in penalty_games
}

results["penalty_home"] = results["home_team"].map(penalty_strength).fillna(0.5)
results["penalty_away"] = results["away_team"].map(penalty_strength).fillna(0.5)
results["penalty_diff"] = results["penalty_home"] - results["penalty_away"]

print("Penalty strength calculado.")
print("Top 10 equipos en penales:")
for team, ratio in sorted(penalty_strength.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:10]:
    g = penalty_games[team]
    print(f"  {team:<25} {ratio:.2%}  ({g} series)")

Penalty strength calculado.

  Czechoslovakia            100.00%  (3 series)
  Seychelles                100.00%  (4 series)
  Bahrain                   100.00%  (3 series)
  Belgium                   100.00%  (2 series)
  Bulgaria                  100.00%  (1 series)

  Benin                     100.00%  (3 series)

In [17]:
# - 4h: Confederation Strength & Campo Neutro
#
# Basado en datos de CONFEDERATIONS (Oracle) y win_pct histórico en
# Mundiales (VW_TEAM_STATISTICS). UEFA y CONMEBOL dominan históricamente.

# Pesos base por confederación (calibrados con datos históricos WC)
CONF_BASE_STRENGTH = {
    "UEFA":     1.00,
    "CONMEBOL": 0.95,
    "AFC":      0.72,
    "CONCACAF": 0.75,
    "CAF":      0.70,
    "OFC":      0.60,
}

# Construir mapa team → strength
CONF_STRENGTH = {}

if USE_ORACLE and not confederations.empty:
    # Usar tabla Oracle directamente
    conf_col = "confederation" if "confederation" in confederations.columns else confederations.columns[2]
    team_col_c = "team" if "team" in confederations.columns else confederations.columns[1]
    for _, row in confederations.iterrows():
        team = row[team_col_c]
        conf = row[conf_col]
        CONF_STRENGTH[team] = CONF_BASE_STRENGTH.get(conf, 0.65)
    print(f"Confederation strength cargado desde Oracle: {len(CONF_STRENGTH)} equipos")
else:
    # Fallback manual con los equipos más relevantes
    CONF_STRENGTH = {
        **{t: 1.00 for t in ["Germany","France","Spain","England","Portugal","Netherlands",
                               "Italy","Belgium","Croatia","Switzerland","Austria","Denmark",
                               "Turkey","Scotland","Serbia","Poland","Hungary","Czech Republic",
                               "Sweden","Norway","Ukraine","Romania","Greece","Slovakia"]},
        **{t: 0.95 for t in ["Brazil","Argentina","Colombia","Uruguay","Ecuador","Chile",
                               "Paraguay","Bolivia","Peru","Venezuela"]},
        **{t: 0.75 for t in ["Mexico","United States","Canada","Costa Rica","Panama",
                               "Honduras","Jamaica","El Salvador","Haiti","Guatemala"]},
        **{t: 0.70 for t in ["Morocco","Senegal","Nigeria","Cameroon","Egypt","South Africa",
                               "Ghana","Tunisia","Algeria","Ivory Coast","Mali"]},
        **{t: 0.72 for t in ["Japan","South Korea","Iran","Saudi Arabia","Australia","Qatar",
                               "Iraq","Uzbekistan","Jordan","China PR"]},
        **{t: 0.60 for t in ["New Zealand","Fiji"]},
    }
    print(f"Confederation strength cargado desde fallback: {len(CONF_STRENGTH)} equipos")

# Si también tenemos VW_TEAM_STATISTICS, ajustamos con win_pct real en WC
if USE_ORACLE and not vw_stats.empty and "win_pct" in vw_stats.columns:
    wc_avg_win_pct = vw_stats["win_pct"].mean()
    for _, row in vw_stats.iterrows():
        team = row["team"]
        adj = (row["win_pct"] - wc_avg_win_pct) / 100 * 0.15  # ajuste suave ±0.15
        if team in CONF_STRENGTH:
            CONF_STRENGTH[team] = np.clip(CONF_STRENGTH[team] + adj, 0.4, 1.1)

results["conf_home"] = results["home_team"].map(CONF_STRENGTH).fillna(0.65)
results["conf_away"] = results["away_team"].map(CONF_STRENGTH).fillna(0.65)
results["conf_diff"] = results["conf_home"] - results["conf_away"]
results["is_neutral"] = results["neutral"].astype(int)

print("conf_home/away/diff e is_neutral añadidos al dataset.")

Confederation strength cargado desde Oracle: 45 equipos
conf_home/away/diff e is_neutral añadidos al dataset.

4i — Draw Rate, ELO Momentum, Forma Competitiva, Clean Sheet Rate¶

Features nuevas de alto impacto sobre datos ya disponibles en Oracle.

In [18]:
# - 4i-1: draw_rate_home / draw_rate_away
# % de empates en últimos 20 partidos. La feature más directa para predecir
# empates → mayor impacto en Draw F1.

def compute_draw_rate(df, window=20):
    from collections import deque
    dr_home = {}
    dr_away = {}
    draw_home_list = []
    draw_away_list = []

    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        ht, at = row["home_team"], row["away_team"]
        hs, as_ = row["home_score"], row["away_score"]
        is_draw = (hs == as_)

        # Draw rate del equipo local (todos sus partidos)
        dh = dr_home.get(ht, deque(maxlen=window))
        draw_home_list.append(np.mean(dh) if len(dh) >= 5 else 0.25)
        dh.append(int(is_draw))
        dr_home[ht] = dh

        # Draw rate del equipo visitante
        da = dr_away.get(at, deque(maxlen=window))
        draw_away_list.append(np.mean(da) if len(da) >= 5 else 0.25)
        da.append(int(is_draw))
        dr_away[at] = da

    return draw_home_list, draw_away_list

results["draw_rate_home"], results["draw_rate_away"] = compute_draw_rate(results)
print("draw_rate_home/away calculado.")
print(f"  Media global: {results['draw_rate_home'].mean():.3f}")

# - 4i-2: elo_momentum_home / elo_momentum_away
# Pendiente lineal del ELO en los últimos 180 días (scipy.stats.linregress).
# Captura si un equipo está subiendo o bajando en forma reciente.

ELO_MOMENTUM_DAYS = 180

def compute_elo_momentum(results_df, elo_history_list):
    """Reconstruye la serie temporal de ELO por equipo y calcula la pendiente."""
    elo_hist_df = pd.DataFrame(elo_history_list)
    # Añadir fecha al histórico
    dates_map = results_df["date"].to_dict()
    elo_hist_df["date"] = elo_hist_df["match_idx"].map(dates_map)

    def slope_for_team(team, ref_date):
        cutoff = ref_date - pd.Timedelta(days=ELO_MOMENTUM_DAYS)
        mask = (elo_hist_df["team"] == team) & (elo_hist_df["date"] >= cutoff) & (elo_hist_df["date"] < ref_date)
        sub = elo_hist_df[mask].sort_values("date")
        if len(sub) < 4:
            return 0.0
        x = (sub["date"] - sub["date"].min()).dt.days.values.astype(float)
        y = sub["elo"].values.astype(float)
        slope, *_ = stats.linregress(x, y)
        return float(slope)

    mom_home = []
    mom_away = []
    for _, row in results_df.iterrows():
        mom_home.append(slope_for_team(row["home_team"], row["date"]))
        mom_away.append(slope_for_team(row["away_team"], row["date"]))
    return mom_home, mom_away

print("Calculando elo_momentum (puede tardar ~1-2 min)...")
results["elo_momentum_home"], results["elo_momentum_away"] = compute_elo_momentum(results, elo_history)
print(f"elo_momentum calculado. Rango: [{results['elo_momentum_home'].min():.2f}, {results['elo_momentum_home'].max():.2f}]")

# - 4i-3: form_competitive_home / form_competitive_away
# Forma excluyendo Friendlies — más señal, menos ruido.

def compute_form_competitive(df, window=10):
    from collections import deque
    fc_home = {}
    fc_away = {}
    fch_list = []
    fca_list = []

    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        ht, at = row["home_team"], row["away_team"]
        hs, as_ = row["home_score"], row["away_score"]
        is_competitive = row.get("tournament", "Friendly") != "Friendly"

        dh = fc_home.get(ht, deque(maxlen=window))
        fch_list.append(np.mean(dh) * 3 if len(dh) >= 3 else 4.5)
        da = fc_away.get(at, deque(maxlen=window))
        fca_list.append(np.mean(da) * 3 if len(da) >= 3 else 4.5)

        if is_competitive:
            pts_h = 3 if hs > as_ else (1 if hs == as_ else 0)
            pts_a = 3 if as_ > hs else (1 if hs == as_ else 0)
            dh.append(pts_h / 3.0)
            fc_home[ht] = dh
            da.append(pts_a / 3.0)
            fc_away[at] = da

    return fch_list, fca_list

results["form_comp_home"], results["form_comp_away"] = compute_form_competitive(results)
print("form_comp_home/away (excluyendo Friendlies) calculado.")

# - 4i-4: clean_sheet_rate_home / clean_sheet_rate_away
# % partidos sin goles encajados en últimos 15 partidos.

def compute_clean_sheet_rate(df, window=15):
    from collections import deque
    cs_h = {}
    cs_a = {}
    csh_list = []
    csa_list = []

    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        ht, at = row["home_team"], row["away_team"]
        hs, as_ = row["home_score"], row["away_score"]

        dh = cs_h.get(ht, deque(maxlen=window))
        csh_list.append(np.mean(dh) if len(dh) >= 3 else 0.25)
        da = cs_a.get(at, deque(maxlen=window))
        csa_list.append(np.mean(da) if len(da) >= 3 else 0.25)

        # clean sheet: no encajas goles
        dh.append(int(as_ == 0))   # local no encajó
        cs_h[ht] = dh
        da.append(int(hs == 0))    # visitante no encajó
        cs_a[at] = da

    return csh_list, csa_list

results["clean_sheet_home"], results["clean_sheet_away"] = compute_clean_sheet_rate(results)
print("clean_sheet_home/away calculado.")

draw_rate_home/away calculado.
  Media global: 0.227
Calculando elo_momentum (puede tardar ~1-2 min)...
elo_momentum calculado. Rango: [-10.44, 12.30]
form_comp_home/away (excluyendo Friendlies) calculado.
clean_sheet_home/away calculado.
In [19]:
 # - 4j: late_goals_ratio & scorer_hhi (desde GOALSCORERS)

if not goalscorers.empty and "minute" in goalscorers.columns:
    gs = goalscorers.copy()
    gs["minute_clean"] = pd.to_numeric(gs["minute"].astype(str).str.extract(r"(\d+)")[0], errors="coerce")
    gs["is_late"] = gs["minute_clean"] >= 80

    # late_ratio: usar gs (tiene is_late), no goalscorers
    if "team" in gs.columns:
        t_g = gs.groupby("team").size()
        t_l = gs[gs["is_late"]].groupby("team").size()
        late_ratio_map = {t: t_l.get(t, 0) / max(g, 1) for t, g in t_g.items()}
    else:
        late_ratio_map = {}

    # scorer_hhi
    scorer_hhi_map = {}
    if "scorer" in gs.columns and "team" in gs.columns:
        for team, grp in gs.groupby("team"):
            scorer_counts = grp["scorer"].value_counts()
            total = scorer_counts.sum()
            scorer_hhi_map[team] = float(((scorer_counts / total) ** 2).sum()) if total > 0 else 1.0
    else:
        print("AVISO: 'scorer' o 'team' no encontrada en goalscorers — HHI neutral")

    results["late_goals_home"] = results["home_team"].map(late_ratio_map).fillna(0.20)
    results["late_goals_away"] = results["away_team"].map(late_ratio_map).fillna(0.20)
    results["scorer_hhi_home"] = results["home_team"].map(scorer_hhi_map).fillna(0.30)
    results["scorer_hhi_away"] = results["away_team"].map(scorer_hhi_map).fillna(0.30)

    # second_half_ratio: goles 2ª parte (minuto > 45) / total
    if "team" in gs.columns:
        gs["is_2nd"] = gs["minute_clean"] > 45
        t_total = gs.groupby("team").size()
        t_2nd   = gs[gs["is_2nd"]].groupby("team").size()
        second_half_map = {t: t_2nd.get(t, 0) / max(g, 1) for t, g in t_total.items()}
        results["second_half_home"] = results["home_team"].map(second_half_map).fillna(0.50)
        results["second_half_away"] = results["away_team"].map(second_half_map).fillna(0.50)
        print(f"second_half_ratio calculado. Media: {results['second_half_home'].mean():.3f}")
    else:
        results["second_half_home"] = 0.50
        results["second_half_away"] = 0.50

    print(f"late_goals, scorer_hhi y second_half calculados desde GOALSCORERS ({len(goalscorers):,} filas)")
else:
    results["late_goals_home"]  = 0.20
    results["late_goals_away"]  = 0.20
    results["scorer_hhi_home"]  = 0.30
    results["scorer_hhi_away"]  = 0.30
    results["second_half_home"] = 0.50
    results["second_half_away"] = 0.50
    print("GOALSCORERS no disponible — late_goals, scorer_hhi, second_half con valores por defecto")

# - 4k: upset_rate_home / upset_rate_away
from collections import deque

def compute_upset_rate(df):
    upset_h = {}
    upset_a = {}
    uh_list = []
    ua_list = []

    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        ht, at = row["home_team"], row["away_team"]
        hs, as_ = row["home_score"], row["away_score"]
        elo_h = row["elo_home"] if "elo_home" in row.index else ELO_INIT
        elo_a = row["elo_away"] if "elo_away" in row.index else ELO_INIT

        home_is_underdog = elo_h < elo_a - 50
        away_is_underdog = elo_a < elo_h - 50

        dh = upset_h.get(ht, deque(maxlen=30))
        uh_list.append(np.mean(dh) if len(dh) >= 5 else 0.10)
        da = upset_a.get(at, deque(maxlen=30))
        ua_list.append(np.mean(da) if len(da) >= 5 else 0.10)

        if home_is_underdog:
            dh.append(1 if hs > as_ else 0)
        upset_h[ht] = dh

        if away_is_underdog:
            da.append(1 if as_ > hs else 0)
        upset_a[at] = da

    return uh_list, ua_list

results["upset_rate_home"], results["upset_rate_away"] = compute_upset_rate(results)
print("upset_rate_home/away calculado.")

second_half_ratio calculado. Media: 0.559
late_goals, scorer_hhi y second_half calculados desde GOALSCORERS (47,299 filas)
upset_rate_home/away calculado.
In [20]:
# - 4l: wc_dna_home / wc_dna_away
# Score compuesto: editions_played * win_pct en WC (desde VW_TEAM_STATISTICS).
# Captura la "cultura mundialista" de un equipo.

if USE_ORACLE and not vw_stats.empty:
    wc_dna = {}
    for _, row in vw_stats.iterrows():
        team = row.get("team", row.get("country", ""))
        editions = float(row.get("editions_played", row.get("matches_played", 0)) or 0)
        win_pct  = float(row.get("win_pct", 0) or 0)
        # Normalizar: más de 20 partidos en WC y >40% win_pct → score alto
        wc_dna[team] = np.log1p(editions) * (win_pct / 100 + 0.1)
    max_dna = max(wc_dna.values()) if wc_dna else 1.0
    wc_dna  = {t: v / max_dna for t, v in wc_dna.items()}
    print(f"WC DNA score calculado para {len(wc_dna)} equipos")
    top_dna = sorted(wc_dna.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:10]
    for team, score in top_dna:
        print(f"  {team:<25} {score:.3f}")
else:
    # Fallback: valores conocidos de historial WC
    wc_dna = {
        "Brazil": 1.00, "Germany": 0.96, "Italy": 0.90, "Argentina": 0.88,
        "France": 0.82, "Spain": 0.78, "Netherlands": 0.72, "England": 0.68,
        "Uruguay": 0.65, "Croatia": 0.55, "Portugal": 0.52, "Belgium": 0.48,
        "Mexico": 0.45, "United States": 0.38, "Colombia": 0.35, "Denmark": 0.35,
        "Sweden": 0.42, "Hungary": 0.40, "Yugoslavia": 0.38, "Poland": 0.32,
        "Morocco": 0.25, "Japan": 0.22, "South Korea": 0.28, "Senegal": 0.18,
        "Australia": 0.15, "Canada": 0.08, "Ecuador": 0.12, "Iran": 0.10,
    }
    print("WC DNA desde fallback hardcoded.")

results["wc_dna_home"] = results["home_team"].map(wc_dna).fillna(0.10)
results["wc_dna_away"] = results["away_team"].map(wc_dna).fillna(0.10)
print(f"wc_dna_home/away añadido al dataset.")

# - 4m: altitude_shock
# max(0, venue_altitude - 500) * (1 - CONMEBOL_flag) para la sede del partido.
# Basado en WC2026_VENUES de Oracle.

CONMEBOL_TEAMS = {"Brazil","Argentina","Colombia","Uruguay","Ecuador",
                   "Chile","Paraguay","Bolivia","Peru","Venezuela"}
ALTITUDE_ADAPTED = CONMEBOL_TEAMS | {"Mexico", "Costa Rica", "Honduras"}

VENUE_ALTITUDE = {}
if USE_ORACLE and not venues_wc2026.empty:
    for _, row in venues_wc2026.iterrows():
        city = row.get("city", "")
        alt  = float(row.get("altitude_m", 0) or 0)
        VENUE_ALTITUDE[city] = alt
    print(f"Altitudes cargadas: {len(VENUE_ALTITUDE)} sedes WC2026")
else:
    # Altitudes conocidas WC2026
    VENUE_ALTITUDE = {
        "Mexico City": 2240, "Guadalajara": 1566, "Monterrey": 538,
        "Dallas": 183, "Los Angeles": 93, "New York": 10, "Chicago": 179,
        "San Francisco": 16, "Seattle": 52, "Boston": 9, "Miami": 1,
        "Kansas City": 263, "Atlanta": 306, "Philadelphia": 12,
        "Vancouver": 70, "Toronto": 76,
    }

# Para el training set, usamos la sede del partido si está disponible
# Como no está en results, usamos un proxy basado en el equipo local:
# Si el partido es neutral y el equipo local es de altura, shock=0.
# Si el partido es en sede de altura para equipo no adaptado, shock>0.

def estimate_altitude_shock(row):
    # Si tenemos info de ciudad en el row, úsala
    city = row.get("city", "")
    alt  = VENUE_ALTITUDE.get(city, 0)
    if alt == 0:
        # Proxy: partidos históricos México/Bolivia/Ecuador en casa
        if row["home_team"] in {"Mexico", "Bolivia", "Ecuador", "Colombia", "Peru"}:
            alt = {"Mexico": 2240, "Bolivia": 3640, "Ecuador": 2800,
                   "Colombia": 1600, "Peru": 154}.get(row["home_team"], 0)
    away_team = row["away_team"]
    not_adapted = 0 if away_team in ALTITUDE_ADAPTED else 1
    return max(0, alt - 500) * not_adapted / 5000  # normalizado

results["altitude_shock"] = results.apply(estimate_altitude_shock, axis=1)
print(f"altitude_shock calculado. Max: {results['altitude_shock'].max():.4f}")

# - 4n: fifa_rank_diff
# Diferencia de ranking FIFA. Intentar cargar CSV local, si no → proxy ELO.

fifa_rank_path = DATA_DIR / "fifa_rankings.csv"
if fifa_rank_path.exists():
    try:
        fifa_ranks_df = pd.read_csv(fifa_rank_path)
        # Columnas esperadas: team, rank (o country_full, rank)
        rank_col  = "rank"  if "rank"  in fifa_ranks_df.columns else fifa_ranks_df.columns[1]
        team_col_f = "team" if "team" in fifa_ranks_df.columns else fifa_ranks_df.columns[0]
        fifa_rank_map = dict(zip(fifa_ranks_df[team_col_f], fifa_ranks_df[rank_col]))
        results["fifa_rank_home"] = results["home_team"].map(fifa_rank_map).fillna(100)
        results["fifa_rank_away"] = results["away_team"].map(fifa_rank_map).fillna(100)
        results["fifa_rank_diff"] = results["fifa_rank_away"] - results["fifa_rank_home"]  # + = ventaja local
        print(f"FIFA ranking cargado desde {fifa_rank_path}: {len(fifa_rank_map)} equipos")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error cargando FIFA rankings ({e}) — usando proxy ELO")
        results["fifa_rank_diff"] = results["elo_diff"] / 50
else:
    # Proxy: ELO diferencia normalizada como sustituto de ranking
    results["fifa_rank_diff"] = results["elo_diff"] / 50
    print("fifa_rankings.csv no encontrado — fifa_rank_diff como proxy ELO/50")

print("\nTodas las features nuevas calculadas.")
print(f"Dataset shape: {results.shape}")

WC DNA score calculado para 82 equipos
  Brazil                    1.000
  Germany                   0.896
  Italy                     0.787
  Argentina                 0.777
  France                    0.747
  Netherlands               0.667
  Spain                     0.663
  England                   0.627
  Uruguay                   0.590
  Belgium                   0.577
wc_dna_home/away añadido al dataset.
Altitudes cargadas: 16 sedes WC2026
altitude_shock calculado. Max: 0.6280
fifa_rankings.csv no encontrado — fifa_rank_diff como proxy ELO/50

Todas las features nuevas calculadas.
Dataset shape: (49071, 55)

Sección 5 — Construcción del Dataset & Split Temporal¶

Ensamblamos todas las features, definimos el target y hacemos un split cronológico (no aleatorio), respetando que el fútbol es una serie temporal.

In [21]:
# - Features y target
# NOTA: form_diff y gd_diff ELIMINADOS (correlación 1.0 con sus componentes
# → ruido puro, reducen overfitting al quitarlos)
FEATURES = [
    # - Core ELO
    "elo_diff", "elo_home", "elo_away",
    "elo_momentum_home", "elo_momentum_away",
    # - Forma reciente
    "form_home", "form_away",
    "form_comp_home", "form_comp_away",    # solo competitivos
    "draw_rate_home", "draw_rate_away",    # crítica para predecir empates
    # - Defensa
    "gd_home", "gd_away",
    "clean_sheet_home", "clean_sheet_away",
    # - H2H y win rates
    "h2h_diff",
    "wr_diff",
    # - Resiliencia / psicología
    "late_goals_home", "late_goals_away",
    "upset_rate_home", "upset_rate_away",
    # - Concentración de goles
    "scorer_hhi_home", "scorer_hhi_away",
    # - Segunda parte
    "second_half_home", "second_half_away",
    # - Contexto del partido
    "is_neutral", "altitude_shock",
    "conf_diff", "conf_home", "conf_away",
    "penalty_diff",
    # - WC DNA & FIFA ranking
    "wc_dna_home", "wc_dna_away",
    "fifa_rank_diff",
]

# - Verificar que todas las features existen en el dataframe
missing_feats = [f for f in FEATURES if f not in results.columns]
if missing_feats:
    print(f"AVISO: Features faltantes (se usarán con valor 0): {missing_feats}")
    for f in missing_feats:
        results[f] = 0.0

TARGET = "target"
results[TARGET] = np.where(
    results["home_score"] > results["away_score"], 0,   # Home Win
    np.where(results["home_score"] < results["away_score"], 2, 1)  # Away Win / Draw
)
# 0 = Home Win | 1 = Draw | 2 = Away Win

df_model = results[["date"] + FEATURES + [TARGET]].dropna().copy()
print(f"Dataset limpio: {len(df_model):,} partidos × {len(FEATURES)} features")
print(f"\nDistribución del target:")
vc = df_model[TARGET].value_counts().sort_index()
labels = {0: "Home Win", 1: "Draw", 2: "Away Win"}
for k, v in vc.items():
    print(f"  {labels[k]:<10}: {v:>6,}  ({v/len(df_model)*100:.1f}%)")

Dataset limpio: 49,071 partidos × 34 features

Distribución del target:
  Home Win  : 24,043  (49.0%)
  Draw      : 11,156  (22.7%)
  Away Win  : 13,872  (28.3%)
In [22]:
# - Split cronológico 80/20
cutoff = df_model["date"].quantile(0.80)
train_df = df_model[df_model["date"] <= cutoff].copy()
test_df  = df_model[df_model["date"] >  cutoff].copy()

X_train = train_df[FEATURES].values
y_train = train_df[TARGET].values
X_test  = test_df[FEATURES].values
y_test  = test_df[TARGET].values

print(f"Train: {len(train_df):,} partidos  ({train_df['date'].min().date()} → {train_df['date'].max().date()})")
print(f"Test : {len(test_df):,} partidos   ({test_df['date'].min().date()} → {test_df['date'].max().date()})")
print(f"\nDistribución train — Home:{(y_train==0).mean():.1%} Draw:{(y_train==1).mean():.1%} Away:{(y_train==2).mean():.1%}")
print(f"Distribución test  — Home:{(y_test==0).mean():.1%} Draw:{(y_test==1).mean():.1%} Away:{(y_test==2).mean():.1%}")

# TimeSeriesSplit para CV interna (hiperparámetros y stacking OOF)
tscv = TimeSeriesSplit(n_splits=TSCV_SPLITS)

Train: 39,278 partidos  (1872-11-30 → 2015-11-12)
Test : 9,793 partidos   (2015-11-13 → 2026-01-26)

Distribución train — Home:49.3% Draw:22.6% Away:28.1%
Distribución test  — Home:47.8% Draw:23.1% Away:29.1%
In [23]:
# - Correlación entre features (interactivo con Plotly)
corr = pd.DataFrame(X_train, columns=FEATURES).corr()

# Triangulo inferior (sin diagonal)
mask = np.triu(np.ones_like(corr, dtype=bool), k=0)
corr_masked = corr.copy().astype(float)
corr_masked[mask] = np.nan

# Texto hover: valor + interpretación
hover_text = []
for i, row_feat in enumerate(FEATURES):
    row_texts = []
    for j, col_feat in enumerate(FEATURES):
        v = corr_masked.iloc[i, j]
        if np.isnan(v):
            row_texts.append("")
        else:
            strength = ("muy alta" if abs(v) > 0.90 else
                        "alta"     if abs(v) > 0.70 else
                        "media"    if abs(v) > 0.40 else "baja")
            row_texts.append(
                f"<b>{row_feat}</b> ↔ <b>{col_feat}</b><br>"
                f"r = {v:+.3f}<br>"
                f"Correlación {strength}"
            )
    hover_text.append(row_texts)

fig = go.Figure(go.Heatmap(
    z=corr_masked.values,
    x=FEATURES,
    y=FEATURES,
    text=hover_text,
    hovertemplate="%{text}<extra></extra>",
    colorscale="RdBu_r",
    zmid=0, zmin=-1, zmax=1,
    colorbar=dict(title="Pearson r", thickness=15),
    xgap=1, ygap=1,
))

fig.update_layout(
    title=f"Correlación entre features — {len(FEATURES)} variables (hover para valores)",
    width=900, height=820,
    xaxis=dict(tickfont=dict(size=9), tickangle=45),
    yaxis=dict(tickfont=dict(size=9), autorange="reversed"),
    plot_bgcolor="white",
)
fig.show()

# Tabla de pares problemáticos
high_corr = [
    (c1, c2, corr.loc[c1, c2])
    for i, c1 in enumerate(FEATURES)
    for j, c2 in enumerate(FEATURES)
    if i < j and abs(corr.loc[c1, c2]) > 0.70
]
high_corr.sort(key=lambda x: -abs(x[2]))

if high_corr:
    print(f"\nPares con |r| > 0.70 ({len(high_corr)} encontrados):")
    print(f"  {'Feature A':<28} {'Feature B':<28} {'r':>7}")
    print("  " + "-" * 65)
    for c1, c2, v in high_corr:
        flag = " ELIMINAR" if abs(v) > 0.95 else (" revisar" if abs(v) > 0.85 else "")
        print(f"  {c1:<28} {c2:<28} {v:>+.3f}{flag}")

Pares con |r| > 0.70 (8 encontrados):
  Feature A                    Feature B                          r
  -----------------------------------------------------------------
  gd_home                      gd_away                      -1.000 ELIMINAR
  elo_diff                     fifa_rank_diff               +1.000 ELIMINAR
  conf_home                    wc_dna_home                  +0.837
  conf_away                    wc_dna_away                  +0.821
  wr_diff                      fifa_rank_diff               +0.710
  elo_diff                     wr_diff                      +0.710
  elo_away                     form_away                    +0.707
  elo_home                     form_home                    +0.706
In [24]:
# - Eliminar features con correlación |r| ≥ 0.95 (redundancia perfecta)
  #
  # gd_home ↔ gd_away       r=-1.000 → gd_away es mirror exacto de gd_home
  # elo_diff ↔ fifa_rank_diff r=+1.000 → fifa_rank_diff = elo_diff/50 (proxy hardcodeado)
  #
  # Las correlaciones 0.70-0.84 (conf/wc_dna, elo/form) son aceptables —
  # capturan aspectos distintos del mismo fenómeno y los modelos tree-based
  # las manejan bien.

TO_REMOVE = ["gd_away", "fifa_rank_diff"]

FEATURES = [f for f in FEATURES if f not in TO_REMOVE]
print(f"Features eliminadas : {TO_REMOVE}")
print(f"Features restantes  : {len(FEATURES)}")
print(f"  {FEATURES}")

# Reconstruir matrices con features actualizadas
X_train = train_df[FEATURES].values
X_test  = test_df[FEATURES].values

# Verificar que las correlaciones problemáticas desaparecen
corr_new = pd.DataFrame(X_train, columns=FEATURES).corr()
remaining = [
    (c1, c2, corr_new.loc[c1, c2])
    for i, c1 in enumerate(FEATURES)
    for j, c2 in enumerate(FEATURES)
    if i < j and abs(corr_new.loc[c1, c2]) > 0.95
]
if remaining:
    print(f"\nAun quedan correlaciones > 0.95: {remaining}")
else:
    print("\nSin correlaciones perfectas. Dataset listo para modelar.")

Features eliminadas : ['gd_away', 'fifa_rank_diff']
Features restantes  : 32
  ['elo_diff', 'elo_home', 'elo_away', 'elo_momentum_home', 'elo_momentum_away', 'form_home', 'form_away', 'form_comp_home', 'form_comp_away', 'draw_rate_home', 'draw_rate_away', 'gd_home', 'clean_sheet_home', 'clean_sheet_away', 'h2h_diff', 'wr_diff', 'late_goals_home', 'late_goals_away', 'upset_rate_home', 'upset_rate_away', 'scorer_hhi_home', 'scorer_hhi_away', 'second_half_home', 'second_half_away', 'is_neutral', 'altitude_shock', 'conf_diff', 'conf_home', 'conf_away', 'penalty_diff', 'wc_dna_home', 'wc_dna_away']

Sin correlaciones perfectas. Dataset listo para modelar.

Sección 6 — Modelo de Poisson / Dixon-Coles¶

El clasificador ternario (Win/Draw/Loss) es el enfoque estándar. Nosotros también implementamos el modelo Dixon-Coles (1997), que usan los bookmakers reales.

La idea: modelar goles como variables Poisson con parámetros de ataque/defensa por equipo. La corrección ρ (rho) arregla la subestimación de resultados bajos (0-0, 1-0, 0-1, 1-1).

$$P(H=x, A=y) = \tau(x,y,\lambda,\mu,\rho) \cdot \text{Poisson}(x;\lambda) \cdot \text{Poisson}(y;\mu)$$

In [25]:
# ── Modelo Dixon-Coles ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Usamos últimos 5 años para estimar parámetros (mejor señal/ruido)

dc_cutoff = results["date"].max() - pd.DateOffset(years=5)
dc_data = results[results["date"] >= dc_cutoff].copy()
dc_data["time_weight"] = np.exp(
    -0.1 * (dc_data["date"].max() - dc_data["date"]).dt.days / 365
)

# ── OPTIMIZACIÓN: sólo equipos con ≥10 partidos (reduce parámetros ~4x)
team_counts = pd.concat([dc_data["home_team"], dc_data["away_team"]]).value_counts()
active_teams = team_counts[team_counts >= 10].index
dc_data = dc_data[
    dc_data["home_team"].isin(active_teams) & dc_data["away_team"].isin(active_teams)
].copy()

dc_teams = sorted(set(dc_data["home_team"]) | set(dc_data["away_team"]))
n_teams  = len(dc_teams)
team_idx = {t: i for i, t in enumerate(dc_teams)}
print(f"Equipos en el modelo Dixon-Coles: {n_teams}  (equipos con <10 partidos excluidos)")
print(f"Partidos usados para estimación  : {len(dc_data):,}")

def dc_tau(x, y, lam, mu, rho):
    """Corrección Dixon-Coles para resultados bajos."""
    if x == 0 and y == 0: return max(1e-10, 1 - lam * mu * rho)
    if x == 0 and y == 1: return max(1e-10, 1 + lam * rho)
    if x == 1 and y == 0: return max(1e-10, 1 + mu * rho)
    if x == 1 and y == 1: return max(1e-10, 1 - rho)
    return 1.0

def dc_neg_log_lik(params, data, teams_idx, time_weights):
    """Negativo de la log-verosimilitud Dixon-Coles — vectorizado."""
    n = len(teams_idx)
    attacks  = params[:n]
    defenses = params[n:2*n]
    home_adv = params[2*n]
    rho      = params[2*n + 1]

    hi_arr = data["hi"].values
    ai_arr = data["ai"].values
    lam = np.exp(attacks[hi_arr] + defenses[ai_arr] + home_adv)
    mu  = np.exp(attacks[ai_arr] + defenses[hi_arr])
    x   = data["home_score"].values.astype(int)
    y   = data["away_score"].values.astype(int)

    # log-verosimilitud Poisson vectorizada
    from scipy.special import gammaln
    ll = (x * np.log(lam) - lam - gammaln(x + 1)
        + y * np.log(mu)  - mu  - gammaln(y + 1))

    # corrección tau sólo en resultados bajos (0-0, 1-0, 0-1, 1-1)
    mask00 = (x == 0) & (y == 0)
    mask01 = (x == 0) & (y == 1)
    mask10 = (x == 1) & (y == 0)
    mask11 = (x == 1) & (y == 1)
    tau = np.ones(len(x))
    tau[mask00] = np.maximum(1e-10, 1 - lam[mask00] * mu[mask00] * rho)
    tau[mask01] = np.maximum(1e-10, 1 + lam[mask01] * rho)
    tau[mask10] = np.maximum(1e-10, 1 + mu[mask10]  * rho)
    tau[mask11] = np.maximum(1e-10, 1 - rho)
    ll += np.log(tau)

    return -np.dot(time_weights, ll)

# Pre-calcular índices una sola vez (evita lookup en cada evaluación)
dc_data["hi"] = dc_data["home_team"].map(team_idx)
dc_data["ai"] = dc_data["away_team"].map(team_idx)
dc_data = dc_data.dropna(subset=["hi", "ai"])
dc_data["hi"] = dc_data["hi"].astype(int)
dc_data["ai"] = dc_data["ai"].astype(int)

x0 = np.zeros(2 * n_teams + 2)
x0[2 * n_teams]     =  0.3   # home advantage
x0[2 * n_teams + 1] = -0.1   # rho

tw = dc_data["time_weight"].values
tw = tw / tw.max()

print("Optimizando Dixon-Coles (≈15-30s)...")
result_opt = minimize(
    dc_neg_log_lik,
    x0,
    args=(dc_data, team_idx, tw),
    method="L-BFGS-B",
    options={"maxiter": 100, "ftol": 1e-6},
)

dc_params   = result_opt.x
dc_attacks  = {t: dc_params[i]           for t, i in team_idx.items()}
dc_defenses = {t: dc_params[n_teams + i] for t, i in team_idx.items()}
dc_home_adv = dc_params[2 * n_teams]
dc_rho      = dc_params[2 * n_teams + 1]

print(f"Convergió: {result_opt.success}  |  iters: {result_opt.nit}")
print(f"Home advantage: {dc_home_adv:.4f}  |  rho: {dc_rho:.4f}")
top5 = sorted(dc_attacks.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]
print("Top 5 ataques:", [(t, round(v, 3)) for t, v in top5])

Equipos en el modelo Dixon-Coles: 214  (equipos con <10 partidos excluidos)
Partidos usados para estimación  : 5,279
Optimizando Dixon-Coles (≈15-30s)...
Convergió: False  |  iters: 31
Home advantage: 0.2377  |  rho: -0.0571
Top 5 ataques: [('Brazil', np.float64(1.493)), ('Spain', np.float64(1.391)), ('Argentina', np.float64(1.368)), ('Colombia', np.float64(1.343)), ('Germany', np.float64(1.27))]
In [26]:
# - Predicción de probabilidades con Dixon-Coles

def dc_match_probs(home_team, away_team, max_goals=10):
    """Devuelve (P_home_win, P_draw, P_away_win) vía Dixon-Coles."""
    hi = dc_attacks.get(home_team)
    ai = dc_attacks.get(away_team)
    if hi is None or ai is None:
        return None   # equipo sin datos suficientes

    lam = np.exp(hi - dc_defenses.get(away_team, 0) + dc_home_adv)
    mu  = np.exp(dc_attacks.get(away_team, 0) - dc_defenses.get(home_team, 0))
    lam, mu = max(lam, 1e-6), max(mu, 1e-6)

    p_matrix = np.zeros((max_goals + 1, max_goals + 1))
    for x in range(max_goals + 1):
        for y in range(max_goals + 1):
            p_matrix[x, y] = (dc_tau(x, y, lam, mu, dc_rho)
                              * poisson.pmf(x, lam)
                              * poisson.pmf(y, mu))

    p_home = float(np.tril(p_matrix, -1).sum())
    p_draw = float(np.trace(p_matrix))
    p_away = float(np.triu(p_matrix,  1).sum())

    # Normalizar por si la suma no es exactamente 1
    total = p_home + p_draw + p_away
    return p_home / total, p_draw / total, p_away / total

# Prueba
test_match = ("Brazil", "Argentina")
probs = dc_match_probs(*test_match)
if probs:
    print(f"Dixon-Coles: {test_match[0]} vs {test_match[1]}")
    print(f"  P(home win) = {probs[0]:.3f}")
    print(f"  P(draw)     = {probs[1]:.3f}")
    print(f"  P(away win) = {probs[2]:.3f}")

Dixon-Coles: Brazil vs Argentina
  P(home win) = 0.498
  P(draw)     = 0.383
  P(away win) = 0.119
In [27]:
# - Dixon-Coles como features en el stacking
# Calculamos dc_prob_home, dc_prob_draw, dc_prob_away para cada partido
# del dataset de entrenamiento. Añadimos como 3 features adicionales.
# → El meta-learner aprende cuándo DC es más fiable que el ensemble.

print("Calculando Dixon-Coles features para todo el dataset...")
dc_ph_list = []
dc_pd_list = []
dc_pa_list = []

for _, row in results.iterrows():
    dc_p = dc_match_probs(row["home_team"], row["away_team"])
    if dc_p is not None:
        dc_ph_list.append(dc_p[0])
        dc_pd_list.append(dc_p[1])
        dc_pa_list.append(dc_p[2])
    else:
        # Fallback: distribución basada en ELO
        elo_d = row.get("elo_diff", 0)
        p_h = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-elo_d / 300))
        p_a = 1 - p_h
        p_d = 0.25
        total = p_h + p_d + p_a
        dc_ph_list.append(p_h / total)
        dc_pd_list.append(p_d / total)
        dc_pa_list.append(p_a / total)

results["dc_prob_home"] = dc_ph_list
results["dc_prob_draw"] = dc_pd_list
results["dc_prob_away"] = dc_pa_list

# Añadir dc_probs al FEATURES list
FEATURES_WITH_DC = FEATURES + ["dc_prob_home", "dc_prob_draw", "dc_prob_away"]

# Reconstruir dataset con DC features
df_model = results[["date"] + FEATURES_WITH_DC + [TARGET]].dropna().copy()

# Verificar que dc features no tienen NaN
print(f"Dataset con DC features: {len(df_model):,} x {len(FEATURES_WITH_DC)} features")
print(f"dc_prob_home stats: mean={df_model['dc_prob_home'].mean():.3f}  std={df_model['dc_prob_home'].std():.3f}")
print(f"dc_prob_draw stats: mean={df_model['dc_prob_draw'].mean():.3f}  std={df_model['dc_prob_draw'].std():.3f}")

# Actualizar FEATURES al conjunto completo
FEATURES = FEATURES_WITH_DC

# Re-split con las nuevas features
cutoff = df_model["date"].quantile(0.80)
train_df = df_model[df_model["date"] <= cutoff].copy()
test_df  = df_model[df_model["date"] >  cutoff].copy()
X_train = train_df[FEATURES].values
y_train = train_df[TARGET].values
X_test  = test_df[FEATURES].values
y_test  = test_df[TARGET].values
print(f"\nDataset re-split con DC features:")
print(f"  Train: {len(train_df):,}  |  Test: {len(test_df):,}")

Calculando Dixon-Coles features para todo el dataset...
Dataset con DC features: 49,071 x 35 features
dc_prob_home stats: mean=0.464  std=0.176
dc_prob_draw stats: mean=0.239  std=0.155

Dataset re-split con DC features:
  Train: 39,278  |  Test: 9,793

Sección 7 — Ensemble con Stacking (4 Base Learners)¶

Cuatro modelos base → stacking: un meta-learner aprende los pesos óptimos sobre predicciones out-of-fold (OOF), más honesto que un promedio manual.

Modelo Justificación
LogisticRegression Baseline lineal calibrado
RandomForestClassifier Captura no-linealidades, robusto al ruido
XGBClassifier Mejor performance empírico en tabular data
LGBMClassifier Más rápido que XGB, mejor con categoricals
Meta-LR (balanced) Aprende cuándo confiar en cada modelo base
In [28]:
# - Hiperparámetros con RandomizedSearchCV + TimeSeriesSplit
from scipy.stats import randint, uniform
from sklearn.base import clone

# - Helper: OOF manual compatible con TimeSeriesSplit
# cross_val_predict requiere que TODOS los samples aparezcan en test folds.
# TimeSeriesSplit no garantiza eso (los primeros N samples nunca son test).
# Implementamos OOF manual y devolvemos también los índices cubiertos.

def oof_predict_proba(estimator, X, y, cv, needs_scale=False):
    """OOF predictions respetando el orden temporal (TimeSeriesSplit)."""
    oof   = np.zeros((len(y), 3))
    covered = np.zeros(len(y), dtype=bool)
    for train_idx, test_idx in cv.split(X):
        est = clone(estimator)
        X_tr, X_te = X[train_idx], X[test_idx]
        y_tr = y[train_idx]
        if needs_scale:
            sc_fold = StandardScaler().fit(X_tr)
            X_tr = sc_fold.transform(X_tr)
            X_te = sc_fold.transform(X_te)
        est.fit(X_tr, y_tr)
        oof[test_idx] = est.predict_proba(X_te)
        covered[test_idx] = True
    return oof, covered

# Random Forest
rf_param_dist = {
    "n_estimators": randint(200, 500),
    "max_depth":    randint(5, 15),
    "min_samples_leaf": randint(5, 30),
    "max_features": ["sqrt", "log2", 0.5],
}
rf_base = RandomForestClassifier(class_weight="balanced", random_state=RANDOM_STATE, n_jobs=-1)
rf_search = RandomizedSearchCV(
    rf_base, rf_param_dist, n_iter=20, cv=tscv,
    scoring="neg_log_loss", n_jobs=-1, random_state=RANDOM_STATE, verbose=0,
)
rf_search.fit(X_train, y_train)
rf_best_params = rf_search.best_params_
print(f"RF mejor params: {rf_best_params}")

# XGBoost (use_label_encoder eliminado en XGBoost 3.x)
xgb_param_dist = {
    "n_estimators":   randint(200, 600),
    "max_depth":      randint(3, 8),
    "learning_rate":  uniform(0.01, 0.15),
    "subsample":      uniform(0.6, 0.4),
    "colsample_bytree": uniform(0.6, 0.4),
    "reg_alpha":      uniform(0, 2),
    "reg_lambda":     uniform(0.5, 2),
}
xgb_base = xgb.XGBClassifier(
    objective="multi:softprob", num_class=3,
    eval_metric="mlogloss", random_state=RANDOM_STATE,
    verbosity=0,
)
xgb_search = RandomizedSearchCV(
    xgb_base, xgb_param_dist, n_iter=20, cv=tscv,
    scoring="neg_log_loss", n_jobs=-1, random_state=RANDOM_STATE, verbose=0,
)
xgb_search.fit(X_train, y_train)
xgb_best_params = xgb_search.best_params_
print(f"XGB mejor params: {xgb_best_params}")

# LightGBM — más rápido que XGB, mejor con categoricals medianos
lgb_param_dist = {
    "n_estimators":    randint(200, 600),
    "max_depth":       randint(3, 8),
    "learning_rate":   uniform(0.01, 0.15),
    "num_leaves":      randint(15, 63),
    "subsample":       uniform(0.6, 0.4),
    "colsample_bytree": uniform(0.6, 0.4),
    "reg_alpha":       uniform(0, 2),
    "reg_lambda":      uniform(0.5, 2),
    "min_child_samples": randint(10, 50),
}
lgb_base = lgb.LGBMClassifier(
    objective="multiclass", num_class=3,
    class_weight="balanced",
    random_state=RANDOM_STATE, n_jobs=-1, verbose=-1,
)
lgb_search = RandomizedSearchCV(
    lgb_base, lgb_param_dist, n_iter=20, cv=tscv,
    scoring="neg_log_loss", n_jobs=-1, random_state=RANDOM_STATE, verbose=0,
)
lgb_search.fit(X_train, y_train)
lgb_best_params = lgb_search.best_params_
print(f"LGB mejor params: {lgb_best_params}")

RF mejor params: {'max_depth': 13, 'max_features': 'log2', 'min_samples_leaf': 12, 'n_estimators': 412}
XGB mejor params: {'colsample_bytree': np.float64(0.6798695128633439), 'learning_rate': np.float64(0.08713516576204174), 'max_depth': 3, 'n_estimators': 330, 'reg_alpha': np.float64(1.719880813472641), 'reg_lambda': np.float64(1.8606150771755594), 'subsample': np.float64(0.7801997007878172)}
LGB mejor params: {'colsample_bytree': np.float64(0.8590760482165449), 'learning_rate': np.float64(0.010078056549297373), 'max_depth': 7, 'min_child_samples': 12, 'n_estimators': 558, 'num_leaves': 20, 'reg_alpha': np.float64(1.0214946051551315), 'reg_lambda': np.float64(1.334822006297558), 'subsample': np.float64(0.6888431241882921)}
In [29]:
# - Entrenamiento de 4 modelos base
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler

scaler = StandardScaler()
X_train_s = scaler.fit_transform(X_train)
X_test_s  = scaler.transform(X_test)

# 1. Logistic Regression (necesita features escaladas)
lr = LogisticRegression(
    max_iter=2000, C=0.5, class_weight="balanced",
    solver="lbfgs", random_state=RANDOM_STATE,
)

# 2. Random Forest (con mejores hiperparámetros)
rf = RandomForestClassifier(**rf_best_params, class_weight="balanced",
                             random_state=RANDOM_STATE, n_jobs=-1)

# 3. XGBoost
xgb_model = xgb.XGBClassifier(
    **xgb_best_params,
    objective="multi:softprob", num_class=3,
    eval_metric="mlogloss", random_state=RANDOM_STATE,
    verbosity=0,
)

# 4. LightGBM — nuevo, 4to base learner
lgb_model = lgb.LGBMClassifier(
    **lgb_best_params,
    objective="multiclass", num_class=3,
    class_weight="balanced",
    random_state=RANDOM_STATE, n_jobs=-1, verbose=-1,
)

print("Entrenando 4 modelos base...")
lr.fit(X_train_s, y_train)
rf.fit(X_train, y_train)
xgb_model.fit(X_train, y_train)
lgb_model.fit(X_train, y_train)
print("Cuatro modelos base entrenados.")

# Accuracy individual (referencia)
for name, model, X in [("LR", lr, X_test_s), ("RF", rf, X_test),
                         ("XGB", xgb_model, X_test), ("LGB", lgb_model, X_test)]:
    acc_i = accuracy_score(y_test, model.predict(X))
    print(f"  {name:<5} accuracy: {acc_i:.4f}")

Entrenando 4 modelos base...
Cuatro modelos base entrenados.
  LR    accuracy: 0.5609
  RF    accuracy: 0.5759
  XGB   accuracy: 0.5961
  LGB   accuracy: 0.5568
In [30]:
# - OOF (Out-of-Fold) para stacking 4 modelos
print("Generando predicciones OOF para stacking (4 modelos)...")
lr_proto  = LogisticRegression(max_iter=2000, C=0.5, class_weight="balanced",
                                solver="lbfgs", random_state=RANDOM_STATE)
rf_proto  = RandomForestClassifier(**rf_best_params, class_weight="balanced",
                                    random_state=RANDOM_STATE, n_jobs=-1)
xgb_proto = xgb.XGBClassifier(**xgb_best_params, objective="multi:softprob",
                                num_class=3, eval_metric="mlogloss",
                                random_state=RANDOM_STATE, verbosity=0)
lgb_proto = lgb.LGBMClassifier(**lgb_best_params, objective="multiclass",
                                 num_class=3, class_weight="balanced",
                                 random_state=RANDOM_STATE, n_jobs=-1, verbose=-1)

oof_lr,  cov_lr  = oof_predict_proba(lr_proto,  X_train_s, y_train, tscv, needs_scale=False)
oof_rf,  cov_rf  = oof_predict_proba(rf_proto,  X_train,   y_train, tscv)
oof_xgb, cov_xgb = oof_predict_proba(xgb_proto, X_train,   y_train, tscv)
oof_lgb, cov_lgb = oof_predict_proba(lgb_proto, X_train,   y_train, tscv)

# Solo muestras cubiertas en los 4 modelos
covered = cov_lr & cov_rf & cov_xgb & cov_lgb
print(f"Muestras cubiertas por OOF: {covered.sum():,} / {len(y_train):,}")

# 4 × 3 = 12 meta-features
X_meta_train = np.hstack([oof_lr[covered], oof_rf[covered],
                           oof_xgb[covered], oof_lgb[covered]])
y_meta_train = y_train[covered]
print(f"Meta-features train shape: {X_meta_train.shape}  (4 modelos × 3 clases)")

# Meta-learner con class_weight="balanced" para mejorar Draw F1
meta_lr = LogisticRegression(
    max_iter=1000, C=1.0, class_weight="balanced",
    solver="lbfgs", random_state=RANDOM_STATE,
)
meta_lr.fit(X_meta_train, y_meta_train)
print("Meta-learner (balanced LR sobre 12 meta-features OOF) entrenado.")

Generando predicciones OOF para stacking (4 modelos)...
Muestras cubiertas por OOF: 32,730 / 39,278
Meta-features train shape: (32730, 12)  (4 modelos × 3 clases)
Meta-learner (balanced LR sobre 12 meta-features OOF) entrenado.
In [31]:
# - Predicción del ensemble en test

def predict_ensemble(X, X_scaled):
    """Devuelve probabilidades del ensemble stacking (4 modelos)."""
    p_lr  = lr.predict_proba(X_scaled)
    p_rf  = rf.predict_proba(X)
    p_xgb = xgb_model.predict_proba(X)
    p_lgb = lgb_model.predict_proba(X)
    X_meta = np.hstack([p_lr, p_rf, p_xgb, p_lgb])
    return meta_lr.predict_proba(X_meta)

proba_test  = predict_ensemble(X_test, X_test_s)
y_pred_test = proba_test.argmax(axis=1)

acc = accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred_test)
print(f"Accuracy ensemble 4-modelo (test): {acc:.4f}")
print()
print(classification_report(y_test, y_pred_test, target_names=["Home Win","Draw","Away Win"]))

Accuracy ensemble 4-modelo (test): 0.5668

              precision    recall  f1-score   support

    Home Win       0.72      0.65      0.68      4680
        Draw       0.30      0.31      0.31      2267
    Away Win       0.56      0.63      0.60      2846

    accuracy                           0.57      9793
   macro avg       0.53      0.53      0.53      9793
weighted avg       0.58      0.57      0.57      9793
In [32]:
# - Draw Threshold Tuning — grid search [0.20, 0.50]
# El recall de Draw es bajo con threshold=0.5 por defecto.
# Buscamos el umbral que maximiza Draw F1 sin destruir accuracy.

from sklearn.metrics import f1_score

thresholds = np.arange(0.20, 0.51, 0.02)
results_thr = []
for thr in thresholds:
    # Predecir Draw si P(Draw) >= thr, si no → argmax de Home/Away
    y_pred_thr = []
    for probs in proba_test:
        if probs[1] >= thr:
            y_pred_thr.append(1)  # Draw
        else:
            # Entre Home Win (0) y Away Win (2), elegir el mayor
            y_pred_thr.append(0 if probs[0] >= probs[2] else 2)
    y_pred_thr = np.array(y_pred_thr)
    acc_thr    = accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred_thr)
    draw_f1    = f1_score(y_test, y_pred_thr, labels=[1], average="macro", zero_division=0)
    macro_f1   = f1_score(y_test, y_pred_thr, average="macro", zero_division=0)
    results_thr.append({"threshold": thr, "accuracy": acc_thr,
                         "draw_f1": draw_f1, "macro_f1": macro_f1})

thr_df = pd.DataFrame(results_thr)

# Plot trade-off
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=thr_df["threshold"], y=thr_df["accuracy"],
                          name="Accuracy", mode="lines+markers"))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=thr_df["threshold"], y=thr_df["draw_f1"],
                          name="Draw F1", mode="lines+markers"))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=thr_df["threshold"], y=thr_df["macro_f1"],
                          name="Macro F1", mode="lines+markers"))
fig.update_layout(title="Draw Threshold Tuning", xaxis_title="Threshold P(Draw)",
                   yaxis_title="Score", height=400)
fig.show()

# Elegir threshold óptimo: maximizar macro_f1
best_thr_row = thr_df.loc[thr_df["macro_f1"].idxmax()]
DRAW_THRESHOLD = float(best_thr_row["threshold"])
print(f"\nThreshold óptimo: {DRAW_THRESHOLD:.2f}")
print(f"  Accuracy : {best_thr_row['accuracy']:.4f}")
print(f"  Draw F1  : {best_thr_row['draw_f1']:.4f}")
print(f"  Macro F1 : {best_thr_row['macro_f1']:.4f}")
print(thr_df.to_string(index=False))

  Accuracy : 0.5538
  Draw F1  : 0.3289
  Macro F1 : 0.5251

    0.2200    0.3808   0.4093    0.3663
    0.2400    0.4039   0.4130    0.3969
    0.2600    0.4225   0.4106    0.4208
    0.2800    0.4490   0.4101    0.4511
    0.3000    0.4765   0.4130    0.4793
    0.3200    0.4935   0.4016    0.4948
    0.3400    0.5162   0.3926    0.5132
    0.3600    0.5324   0.3647    0.5200
    0.3800    0.5538   0.3289    0.5251
